subject: Fw:
body:
Catherine has e mailed me a couple of times in last few weeks - always v friendly and chatty saying she misses working for me..
Received this today and forwarded to Darren so he can deal with




Thx

G

----- Original Message -----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: gmax1@mindspring.com <gmax1@mindspring.com>
Sent: Wed Mar 05 11:33:52 2008
Subject: 

hello GM,
So I am homeless and getting approved for this apartment however, since I haven't done my '07 taxes yet I need a letter from my previous employer (that'd be you) stating:
 
Catherine Derby was employed by me for 100 years as my personal assistant (bitch) earning a salary of 65k per year.  And then you can finish it off with just how damn fabulous I am (you can leave out the pain in the ass part:)
 
Would you be able to provide this on personal or company letterhead today?  I know, I"m a pain in the ass you can say it:) 
 
You can fax it to: 212 897 8009
 
THanks GM!  


________________________________
